title: The Seducing Woods Trap
description: On pages 15–18, this part focuses on Luffy, Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Judge as The Straw Hats enter Big Mom’s strange territory while Sanji faces the Vinsmoke family and the arranged marriage.
scene: The group is pulled into Whole Cake Island’s strange living landscape, where the forest itself becomes an enemy.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: The Commander Flung Him- Self Towards Sanji!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The fighting style of a man once renowned as "The Garuda"...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's not something you get to see every day!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Hey...mind if I ask you one thing?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Is already a thing of the past!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Should Blood Parents... Be viewed in some holler-than-thou light?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You never bothered giving "that little kid" a single decent memory...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Had it pretty rough back then... Wouldn't you agree?

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island storyline with 19 dialogue beats. Whole Cake Island becomes a hostile fairy-tale battlefield where Sanji’s rescue and Big Mom’s power are both unavoidable.
